creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-10-10 12:40:55 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    games                Makefile 
  Added files:
    games/banihstypos    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    games/banihstypos/files pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  Banihstypos (yes, that is the name) is a simple game to teach you
  typing, FAST.
  It helps you improve your typing by letting you type in a randomly
  selected word which scrolls by on the screen at an increasing speed. If
  the word hits the laser, you'll loose points.
  
  WWW: http://www.vanheusden.com/banihstypos/
  
  PR:             ports/116971
  Submitted by:   Philippe Audeoud <jadawin at tuxaco.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1158    +1 -0      ports/games/Makefile
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/games/banihstypos/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/games/banihstypos/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/games/banihstypos/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/games/banihstypos/pkg-descr (new)
